Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Gronk scowls. You've clearly landed on a sensitive topic.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Running-plant elders not like Trok. So they put Gronk in worse place in market!

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Shoddy running-plant home nearly fall apart! And they hope Gronk fall first.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: At least someone recognizes the precarious nature of Kweebec architecture. You had almost managed to convince yourself that Kweebdrasil's market merely appeared to be a total deathtrap.

Choices.Text: Kweebecs, am I right or am I right?
The market DOES feel pretty dangerous...
